heading: Notification and information reporting
label: 1614 Notification and information reporting
text: Each Federal agency that administers a program to which section 1611, 1612, or 1613 of this title applies shall, directly or through the States, post information and provide general notification to the public and to program recipients of the changes regarding eligibility for any such program pursuant to this subchapter.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A of title IV of , , , which enacted this subchapter and sections 611a and 1437y of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, and amended . For complete classification of this subtitle to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 104–193110 Stat. 2261section 1383 of Title 42Aug. 22, 1996
